wp_end_public_opinion_0.title: A Country That No Longer Believes in You
wp_end_public_opinion_0.body: The people no longer follow you. Every speech triggers boos, every reform is treated like a provocation. You still rule from your palace... but outside, the country has already turned the page.

wp_end_public_opinion_100.title: President of the Crowd
wp_end_public_opinion_100.body: Your name is everywhere. The squares fill up for every one of your speeches, the newspapers repeat your words as if they were obvious truths, and every gesture becomes a national symbol. You love that... too much. You barely dare do anything anymore for fear of upsetting someone.

wp_end_economy_0.title: National Ruin
wp_end_economy_0.body: Banks are closing, harvests are worth nothing, wages are collapsing, and the streets hum with a dry anger. Every decision made too late now weighs like a stone.

wp_end_economy_100.title: Empire of Prosperity
wp_end_economy_100.body: The ports overflow, the factories run nonstop, the country grows richer... too fast. Inequality widens, tensions rise, and the guilty party is obvious: you.

wp_end_defense_0.title: Ghost Army
wp_end_defense_0.body: Military spending is too low, the barracks are empty, and so are the ammunition stocks. Perfect timing: your neighbors want more land and more resources. Ready to change flags?

wp_end_defense_100.title: Military Coup
wp_end_defense_100.body: The army is strong. Too strong. And even though you are its leader, the military would rather follow their general, who wants your job. Oops...

wp_end_diplomacy_0.title: Silent Voice
wp_end_diplomacy_0.body: No one listens to you anymore. When you speak internationally, people leave the room. Some do not even remember the name of your country.

wp_end_diplomacy_100.title: Arbiter of the World
wp_end_diplomacy_100.body: Everyone wants your advice and your blessing. By being so present on the international stage, you neglect the country and people feel abandoned. Bad luck for you: the election is coming, and it smells like disaster...
